violations.text: Raw animal foods (beef, shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (onions, tomatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Whipped cream was observed held at 69 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added ice at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP lobster was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed at 37F, PIC took lobster out of package at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Establishment is lacking a 3-compartment sink for manual ware-washing. Establishment must have a 3-compartment sink for manually washing, rinsing, and sanitizing equipment and utensils. Establishment is currently using a dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (lobster) was observed thawing with the package intact in the walk-in cooler. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. Lobster was observed frozen during time of inspection. Lobster was removed from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
A container of lemons was observed stored in the ice used for consumption. Ice must not be used for anything other than consumption. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Establishment is lacking a 3-compartment sink for manual warewashing. Establishment must have a 3-compartment sink for manual warewashing. Establishment is currently using a dishwasher. Please email inspector proof of installation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
